prompt: A hyper-realistic, cinematic fantasy 3D render, set within a vast, shifting, dream-like architectural space of repeating, geometrically impossible stone arches and liminal passages with shifting, undefined stone structures, replacing the standard dungeon. In the center is the absurdly over-optimized knight, a massive, spherical mountain of interlocking steel plates, maintaining the overall form of image_4.png. The knight's tiny, useless arms and legs barely protrude. The helmet visor is narrowed to an almost imperceptible, thin sliver, and shadows are intensely deepened within and around the armored form to blight any sense of the trapped human being. In one of the tiny, protruding gauntlets, clutched uselessly, is a comically undersized, delicate decorative dagger, clearly a futile letter opener, futility grasped. The green slime is actively pooling at the knight's base, showing visible acid corrosion pitting and active erosion on the geometrically patterned ancient flagstones beneath where it sits and has pooled. A small portion of the slime is actively inching up the lower armor plating, leaving a faint etched trail. The lighting is extremely high-contrast and dramatic, casting complex, impossible shadows against the surreal architecture. The floor is littered with shattered, geometrically perfect crystal forms. Strictly no UI, text, numbers, health bars, or icons.
visual_logic: An RPG knight's armor is so over-optimized for defense that they become a massive, immobile steel sphere. Perfecting the survival metric completely destroys their utility, symbolized by a snapped dagger, leaving them blind, claustrophobic, and helpless against a slow, acidic threat.
